home.headline: Turn fruit trays into showpieces — at home or for events
home.intro: Filmed lessons, clear cutting and plating techniques, and inspiration for every season. Built for beginners: everyday kitchen tools, no prior experience required.
home.demoCardBody: Authentication and purchase are simulated so you can show the product experience to clients.
home.featuredEmpty: No featured courses yet. Mark a published course as featured in admin.
home.galleryAlt2: Bright citrus and mixed fresh fruit
home.testimonial1: The lessons are clear and the visuals make it easy to follow along at home.
home.testimonial2: Finally a structured path for fruit presentation — great for our catering demos.
home.testimonial3: Perfect for showing clients what premium trays can look like.
home.ctaBandBody: Browse the full catalog or reach out — we will respond when the intake pipeline is live.
home.heroSubhead: The friendly online studio for fruit platters — simple steps, gorgeous results.
home.pillarsTitle: Everything you need to serve fruit in style
home.pillar1Body: Focused techniques you can repeat — summer and winter fruits, several looks per fruit.
home.pillar2Body: Principles for balance, color, and height so every board looks intentional.
home.pillar3Body: Inspiration for Shabbat, parties, gifts, and everyday treats — without buying specialty gear.
home.storyTitle: When guests say “you made this?” — it is simpler than it sounds.
home.storyLead: Kids reaching for fruit, friends asking for your secret, a table that feels festive.
home.storyBody: Like learning a perfect omelette, fruit design is a learnable rhythm: watch, practice once, then own it. Our courses are structured for busy people — short videos, lifetime access, learn on phone or laptop.
home.learn1Body: Step-by-step cuts and arrangements you can follow at your own pace.
home.learn2Body: How to build summer and winter boards, balance shapes, and use what you already own.
home.learn3Body: Reference layouts and seasonal ideas so you never start from a blank table.
home.who1Title: You want healthier, prettier snacks for family
home.who1Body: Make fruit the treat everyone reaches for first.
home.who2Title: You love hosting and wowing guests
home.who2Body: Add a signature touch to dinners and celebrations.
home.who3Title: You enjoy gifting and celebrating others
home.who3Body: Trays and boxes that feel personal and premium.
home.who4Title: You are curious, not a pro chef
home.who4Body: No culinary school required — just curiosity and a good knife.
home.outcomesTitle: What you will walk away with
home.outcome1: A repeatable way to build a stunning tray in under fifteen minutes.
home.outcome2: A hosting move that works for brunches, holidays, and weeknights.
home.outcome3: Confidence to skip overpriced ready-made platters.
home.outcome4: A creative outlet your people will actually eat.
home.faq1Q: Do I need prior kitchen experience?
home.faq1A: No. If you can use a knife safely, you can follow the lessons. We build skills in small steps.
home.faq2A: A sharp knife and cutting board are enough. Optional tools are explained when they help.
home.faq3Q: How do I watch the lessons?
home.faq3A: Stream on phone, tablet, or computer — short videos you can replay anytime.
home.gallerySubtitle: A few moods from trays students love to make.

login.title: Sign in
login.lead: One place to enter the demo. Choose student for the learning flow or admin for course management.
login.signupLead: Real registration is not wired yet. Create a mock student session with your email (optional), then explore courses and the dashboard.
login.signupHint: Need to manage courses? Switch to the Sign in tab and continue as admin.
login.failed: Sign-in failed. Check your email format or try again.
login.mockDisabled: Mock sign-in is turned off. Set DEMO_MODE=true (or run in development) to enable it.

courses.catalogEmpty: No courses are available yet. Check back soon or contact us for private workshops.
courses.detailCurriculumHint: Preview lessons are open to everyone. Sign in with a student mock account to unlock every lesson in this demo.
courses.detailNoModules: No modules are published for this course yet.
courses.unlockPrompt: Purchase the course to unlock this lesson.
courses.lessonNoVideo: No video URL is set for this lesson yet.
courses.dashboardLead: Demo access: your student session includes every published course. Pick up where you left off or open the public curriculum anytime.

errors.notFoundBody: The page you are looking for does not exist or has moved.
errors.boundaryBody: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again or return home.

about.title: About the Fruit Design Academy
about.lead: We showcase the craft of fruit design for events and a professional path for digital learners.
about.visionBody: Make fruit design education more accessible through filmed courses, structured practice, and high-quality visual content.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.lead: Send a message — the form is validated on the client and server (Zod). No real email is sent in the demo phase.
contact.successMessage: Message received (demo). Reference: {reference}. No email is sent at this stage.
